hooks.command: git pull --rebase --autostash origin main >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"✓ Synced with GitHub — starting from the latest version"}' || echo '{"systemMessage":"⚠ Could not sync with GitHub (offline or conflict) — run git pull manually before editing"}'

ahead=$(git rev-list --count @{u}..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$ahead" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"⬆ $ahead unpushed commit(s) — push to publish the site and sync your other computer\"}"; fi
